form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at Bulli over 340m (19.16) beating Spencer Fury in Grade 5 on April 7. Has clocked a blistering 24.66 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at Bulli over 340m (19.16) beating Spencer Fury in Grade 5 on April 7. Has clocked a blistering 24.66 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room entering first turn and lost ground.
Entering the first turn was crowded for room and contacted the running rail.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th over 340m at Bulli beaten 6 lengths (19.62) behind Paw Zeva in a Grade 5 on April 7. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 5th over 340m at Bulli beaten 6 lengths (19.62) behind Paw Zeva in a Grade 5 on April 7. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (26.39) over 472m at Bulli. Has a low draw but appears tested on latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (26.39) over 472m at Bulli. Has a low draw but appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Wentworth Park but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 2 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at Wentworth Park and clocking an excellent 29.59 for the 520m trip. Bold showing expected on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame last time at Wentworth Park but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 2 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at Wentworth Park and clocking an excellent 29.59 for the 520m trip. Bold showing expected on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Glanced outwardly entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 440m (25.12) beating Prince Tommy in Grade 5 on March 27. In-form and measures right up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 440m (25.12) beating Prince Tommy in Grade 5 on March 27. In-form and measures right up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (21.11) at Nowra in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 7. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (21.11) at Nowra in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 7. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 440m at this track. Happy to risk in this.
